meta.title: VegaPal — Secure USDT Invoices & Crypto Payments
meta.description: Create professional USDT invoices and accept crypto payments. Built for freelancers and businesses who want secure, trusted deals.
meta.ogDescription: Professional crypto invoicing for freelancers and businesses.

hero.description: Create a secure invoice in seconds, share one payment link, and let your client pay by USDT, bank transfer, or cash — with a professional paid confirmation.

converter.title: Live Currency Converter
converter.subtitle: Check live exchange rates before creating your invoice.
converter.cryptoUnavailable: Crypto live rates are temporarily unavailable.

features.title: The fastest way to invoice in crypto.
features.subtitle: Stripe-grade UX. Wise-grade reliability. PayPal-grade reach — built natively for stablecoins.

fastPayments.title: Fast crypto payments
fastPayments.desc: Get paid in minutes using USDT with a simple payment link.

directWallet.title: Direct to your wallet
directWallet.desc: Payments go straight to your wallet. VegaPal never holds your money.

multiplePayments.title: Accept multiple payments
multiplePayments.desc: Accept Crypto, Bank Transfer, or Cash from one invoice.

professionalInvoices.title: Professional invoices
professionalInvoices.desc: Create clean, modern invoices with QR codes and secure payment links.

dashboard.title: Real-time dashboard
dashboard.desc: Track Paid, Pending, and Overdue invoices in one place.

trusted.title: Trusted by clients
trusted.desc: Professional invoices that make it easy for clients to pay with confidence.

howItWorks.title: From invoice to paid in 3 steps.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent, fair.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes VegaPal on your PDF invoices and payment pages — always.

free.name: Free
free.description: Start invoicing with everything you need.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For freelancers and small businesses scaling up.

business.name: Business
business.description: For teams that need more volume and control.

subscriptionModal.title: Pay with USDT — {{plan}}
subscriptionModal.description: Send the monthly plan amount in USDT. Your plan will be activated manually after we confirm your payment.
subscriptionModal.instructions: After payment, please send your transaction ID (TXID) or payment screenshot to info@vega-pal.com or @vegapal on Telegram so we can activate your plan.
subscriptionModal.networkWarning: Please make sure you select the correct network before sending USDT. Payments sent on the wrong network may be lost.

cta.title: Ready to send your first USDT invoice?
cta.subtitle: Join freelancers and businesses getting paid faster with VegaPal.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Need help with invoices or payments? Our support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

liveSupport.title: 24/7 support
liveSupport.description: Our support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
